title: elaeocarpus gammillii
intro: Elaeocarpus gammillii, also known as Gammill's Elaeocarpus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Elaeocarpaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus gammillii include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Elaeocarpus gammillii can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and ointments, although further research is needed to fully confirm its efficacy and safety.
